channel.title: Cartoon on The Tradewinds Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Cartoon on The Tradewinds Brief

item.title: Welcome to Guyana: The World Discovered Us
item.description: Tourists, investors, oil workers, and opportunists line up at Georgetown immigration as a tanker registers under the Guyana flag. The immigration officer holds on for dear life while a new sign goes up: Please confirm you actually from here.

item.title: The Ministry of Good News
item.description: As the minister unveils rising arrows for roads, hospitals, jobs, and investment, ordinary citizens watch their own pockets sink — and the News Flash promises a new task force to study the problem.
